title: Braised Goat Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, featuring tender goat meat in a rich and flavorful braise, served in a crispy taco shell.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the goat meat in batches, then set aside.
Add onion and garlic to the pot and cook until softened.
Add chili powder and cumin, cook for 1 minute.
Add beer and tomato paste, scraping up any browned bits.
Return goat meat to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover and transfer to the oven, braising for 2 hours.
Shred the goat meat with two forks and season with salt and pepper.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos with the braised goat meat, any desired toppings, and serve immediately.
